# dreamlab

> dreamlab is a creative technology agency co-creating content, products, services and experiences at the intersection of AI, Experiential Tech and Realtime Computing. Developing new possibilities across Film, Games, Advertising, Music, Art, Immersive, Live & Interactive Experiences.

Based across Manchester, Liverpool, Cumbria and London. 46+ deep tech specialists working from labs at MediaCity Manchester, Liverpool, the Lake District (Cumbria) and London.

## Locations

- MediaCity, Manchester — primary lab
- Liverpool
- Cumbria (Lake District)
- London

## What we do

- AI & Automation: agents, RAG, LLM integration, intelligent workflows
- Creative AI Workflows: generative video, image and audio pipelines
- Model Finetuning & Training
- Immersive Experiences: AR, VR, XR, mixed reality
- Interactive Experiences
- Virtual Production: realtime, in-camera VFX, LED volumes
- Content Creation: film, advertising, music, art
- Data & Intelligence
- Product Development & R&D
- Consultancy & Training

## Sectors we work across

Film, Games, Advertising, Music, Art, Immersive Experiences, Live Experiences, Interactive Experiences.

- [Home](https://dreamlab.org.uk/): Overview and positioning
- [About](https://dreamlab.org.uk/about/): Mission, values, capabilities
- [Services](https://dreamlab.org.uk/services/): What we deliver
- [Work](https://dreamlab.org.uk/work/): Case studies and clients
- [Team](https://dreamlab.org.uk/team/): The 46+ specialists in the collective
- [Contact](https://dreamlab.org.uk/contact/): Start a project, book training, explore a residency
